jobs.title: Academic Research Assistance Required -- 2
jobs.description:
HIST 1302: Research Assignment #3

The primary goals of this activity are for you to locate a primary and secondary source, and to create a detailed outline of your Research Paper. Use this outline as an opportunity to write down your questions or concerns with your article and what you need to work on before you submit the final version. The FINAL completed Research Paper is due Sunday, April 12 at 11:59 pm. It will be here before you know it! Please ensure that you carefully read the instructions and use the materials provided to you on Canvas. 

·      Due Friday, March 27 at 11:59 pm. 
·

jobs.title: Railway Safety Engineer for Hardware Analysis -- 2
jobs.description:
Contract Functional Safety Engineer – FMEDA / FTA / IEC 61508 SIL3 / Railway

Seeking an experienced contractor to complete FMEDA, FTA, and hardware safety analysis for a railway warning controller platform supporting IEC 61508 SIL3, EN 50126, EN 50129, EN 50159, and EN 50716.

You will review schematics, BOMs, existing FMEDA material, hazard analyses, and safety assumptions, then produce updated FMEDA workbook(s), FTA(s), and a controlled hardware safety analysis report suitable for ISA review.

Essential:

-strong IEC 61508 hardware safety analysis background

-proven FMEDA / FTA experience
